lessons.title: Free time
lessons.grammar: Questions in Pres Simple + Past Simple

vocabulary.en: to be good at sth / doing sth
vocabulary.ru: хорошо разбираться в чём-то / делать что-то
получать удовольствие от чего-то / делать что-то

prompts: what you do at your free time
Do you go out or stay in?
what young/elderly people, children like doing

quizTellAboutPairs.question: Where did they meet for the first time?
quizTellAboutPairs.answer: They met at a university party.
wrongQuestions: When did they get married?
Did they have a wedding party?
What did they have in common?
